quotes.text: I eat the beat like food, so delicious, nutritious, I don't even believe in dishes.
I got the bars showing up in my yard, holographic cards like I'm a Charizard.
I'm a storm in a teacup, no one can keep up.
No stop signs, I only get green lights, I'm on the highway to Shell.
I ain't got no gifts, but my present is a presence.
I do not swear, I do not cuss, but I am who they discuss.
The microphone assassin, dropping hits like what's happening.
You should never interrupt when I put clever words together.
I grab the microphone underground, I know I'm buried, so I switch it up with my vocabulary.
The girl who flies and talks so nice, it's only right that I was born to use mics.
A Canalian is a Canadian alien.
They told me I rap like Eminem; I told them I'm not a Skittle, I'm basically Dr. Dolittle.
My name is Shells, but I won't clam up, I'm no oyster.
Good thing my freestyles are like potatoes, they're versatile.
If you can't handle me at my hula blooping, you don't deserve me at my hula hooping.
Don't forget to hydrate, because if you don't hydrate, you will dehydrate.
I don't even really make mistakes, so there's no need for erasers.
I'm my own boss, you're looking real unemployed.
The amount of times I said 'eh' and 'sorry' today, I might as well have rolled in with a bottle of maple syrup.
I am gazpacho, you a sorbet, 'cause I'm serving gelato.
The more you do it, the less you suck, and the less you suck, the more you like it.
I've decided no one in this universe is allowed to have a bad time ever, we're just gonna aggressively love them until they're happy.
My main mission on this earth is to make sure you have a good day.
The only competition you got is you.
If no one got you flowers, I got a bunch for you right here, please, smell the roses.
The days you needed the most end up becoming the most memorable.
Sometimes we gotta disconnect to feel connected.
This is my swamp, I'ma do what I want.
We do it the female way, without any kind of failure, we refuse to lose.
I'm taking over the internet like I'm a virus, but I'm a good virus, so I don't need no firewall.
They think they're fast, but I'm quicker, I'm Russian, but I'm never in a hurry.
You know my channel, you click it, I got flow finer than a parking ticket.
I'll be the rapper that plays instrumentals for her friends to decimate.
Loneliness is louder when the whole world tries to help me.
You helped me grow so much that I outgrew everything I knew.
Your word gave me energy, so now you're watching me like I was your TV.
I'm not a PokÃ©mon, but I'ma evolve every day.
Juicy as a watermelon when I use my melon.
To be incredible, you gotta practice a lot, and you gotta eat your vegetables.
A little bit of Thug Shells is good for your health.
And I told you: the best ship is friendship.
Friendly neighborhood thug giving y'all love, my version of a favorite drug is a group hug.
Slanted rhymes are like primary colors for a painter, they open up a whole new world.
Whatever you choose, choose it with your whole heart, if you keep your foot in half a decision, nothing's gonna make sense.
Whatever you want to do well, you can do, you've just got to have that attitude.
It's important to be the real version of you. Always be genuine.
It's temporary. Once you remember that, decisions become less scary, and so does the weight that you carry.
Gratitude's the attitude when I'm in the baddest mood.
Emotions are beautiful: there's love where there is sadness, and sadness where there's love.
We do it for the tribe, we don't divide, we multiply.
Live your life, play your part. When it's hard, make it your art. Use your heart, never be afraid to start, leave your mark.
If you get frustrated, that means you've got to push through it, because we don't give up. We're tough. We're gangsters.
I don't compete, but I get the trophy.
Even from the fire, champions are born.
Persistently patient, we aim for amazement.
Any room that I'm inside turns to a rave.

newsletter.title: Weekly Newsletter
newsletter.description: Updates on what thuggy's been up to, from behind the streams content to upcoming events, to cute pet pics!
